response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, well-rounded senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, nearly two decades of experience, and genuine scale exposure (millions of requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby), but he shows no direct experience in the core domain of this role: experimentation platforms, A/B testing, growth engineering, feature flighting, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis. His career has been senior/staff-level IC work at small-to-mid-size companies, without the demonstrated multi-workstream, cross-org platform leadership expected at Principal/IC6. Strong fundamentals do not offset the near-total domain gap for a role this specialized and this senior.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and mobile, with a strong testing/TDD culture (author of D test frameworks)
Real high-scale production experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) matching the 'AI-first' emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, growth, feature-flagging, or metrics/telemetry platform experience — the central requirement of the role
No evidence of Principal-level scope: architecting systems used across multiple teams at enterprise scale or leading multi-workstream initiatives
No demonstrated data-analysis or statistical-methods background required for experiment design, guardrails, and bias detection

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems experience
